reviews.text:
I’ve been a loyal client of Kacie’s for over 10 years, and she has consistently done an incredible job with every procedure I’ve had. Most recently, I began working with Hannah and Melissa to address melasma and have my hormones tested — and I truly can’t say enough good things about the entire team.

I’ve been on antidepressants for over eight years, but deep down I knew something else was going on. After having my hormones tested and starting a customized regimen, it took only three weeks for me to start feeling like myself again. I’m back to working six days a week, full of energy, and sleeping better than ever.

This experience has truly been life-changing. Even my family has said, “It’s so nice to have Courtney back.”

I highly recommend Elan for all your esthetic, health, and wellness needs. I’ll forever be a loyal — and deeply grateful — client.

reviews.text: As someone who works in functional medicine on the non-clinical side of things I was well aware of the benefits and results it can bring to so many people who have not found the support they needed in the conventional medicine framework. After a long search for great FM practitioners with a record of success stories I landed on Dr. Kozlowski. In hindsight, becoming a patient of Dr. Kozlowski was a decision much overdue and the best investment I've made so far because he and his team were able to investigate what was wrong with my body and come up with a plan for getting better. The support and communication has been top notch and that is crucial for every patient who is willing to improve their health for the better. Thank you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJbXoIPbJFRVMRJ0XXRRPZAvI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5M3NLVS1nRRAB
reviews.text:
For the last several years, I have been struggling with chronic auto immune issues.   A friend of mine who is a health care professional highly recommended that I see Dr. Kozlowski.  Dr. Kozlowski is professional, thorough and caring.  In just a few weeks, Dr. Kozlowski was able to identify the root cause of of my health problems and has given me a plan to start the journey back to optimal health.   I am very grateful to be able to work with  Dr. Kozlowski and highly recommend him to anyone
interested in improving their health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJbXoIPbJFRVMRJ0XXRRPZAvI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteFluYWRBEAE
reviews.text: Meeting with Dr. Koz was my first foray into telehealth/telemedicine and let me tell you I couldn't have had a better experience from the safety of my own home. The Dr. was responsive, informative, and compassionate. He not only helped me physically, but he put my mind at ease as well. His office assistant may be the nicest woman in the world and I couldn't recommend the practice enough. I trust that my family & I will be lifelong clients, thank you Dr. Koz!

reviews.name: places/ChIJbXoIPbJFRVMRJ0XXRRPZAvI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhN2NUMDd3RRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Koz and Jasmine have been great to work with. After chasing answers for health problems for several years, I feel like I finally have answers (based on in-depth testing) and a plan to not just treat my symptoms, but to completely heal. Dr. Koz does a great job of explaining what the tests are looking for, and then spends a lot of time explaining the results. Jasmine is incredibly responsive whenever I have questions. I would recommend anyone who is struggling to find answers for their health problems to call Dr. Koz and make an appointment.

reviews.name: places/ChIJbXoIPbJFRVMRJ0XXRRPZAvI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMjZYTnJRRRAB
reviews.text: I have been working with Dr. Kozlowski to fix some digestive issues. He is excellent. reviews.name: places/ChIJEVc7V5o3QlMRv4EcjfK0FAk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poRllWOVFaRmQzWVhKNlJHczRiVmhoUjFKMFVrRRAB
reviews.text:
My PCP referred me to Thriven FM for my gut issues last year.
I began my healing journey in January of 2026 with Dr. Loy Anderson and her amazing team.
When I started the program I had an open mind and positive outlook.
I also had other health concerns along with my gut issues. I have suffered with adult cystic acne, nail fungus, migraines, weight gain, fatigue and pain after a light workout, my whole body felt inflamed. I had brain fog most days. I also have Hashimoto's Hypothyroidism and low iron.
Before the program I was taking digestive enzymes, pre and probiotics to help with my gut issues. I was also taking magnesium to help with sleep and over-all body aches. I was barely getting exercise because I did not like the way I felt after a work out. My body would hurt. I was not sure if I was taking the supplements correctly. I wanted to do more but I did not know how to go about any of it.
After the blood tests and my first visit with Dr. Loy, she did an overview of my results and she put me on the correct doses and supplements for my needs.
The program has an outline of chapters with informative videos through the weeks to months that are easy to follow. There are so many resources available as well. Their coaching calls and group meetings are so helpful.
After a month on the program I began eating better foods. I'm losing weight. I also incorporated the suggested workouts, I didn't feel inflamed afterwards. I'm hydrated. I have nail growth. My skin has calmed down with less breakouts. My mood is better, no more brain fog. I feel energized every morning. I get RESTFUL sleep now.

I still have a long way to go but so far it has been nothing but positive changes.

I'm grateful to my PCP for the referral and to the team at Thriven!

reviews.name: places/ChIJEVc7V5o3QlMRv4EcjfK0FAk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pjd1owWTFkVmhMZFd0eWRXVkNlSE5oT1hOSWVGRRAB
reviews.text: Thriven has made a truly positive and noticeable difference in my life. Even though I’m only midway through the program, I already feel so much better and have significantly more energy. My digestive issues have greatly improved, and I’m learning how to make sustainable, positive lifestyle choices. The entire staff is wonderful—friendly, supportive, and genuinely caring. I’m so grateful I made the decision to invest in myself!

reviews.name: places/ChIJEVc7V5o3QlMRv4EcjfK0FAk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsaFRWSjFPRTB3TVVwUVZEbFdaV1JCWjFFeU9VRRAB
reviews.text:
I started with Thriven last April when I was struggling with bloating, weight gain, chronic inflammation, and a lot of stress. I later found out I had Hashimoto’s with elevated antibodies, which explained a lot.

Within just a few weeks of starting the program, I began feeling dramatically better. Through the supplements, nervous system work, and lifestyle changes, everything shifted. I’ve lost 15–20 pounds, my bloating is almost completely gone, and this is the best I’ve felt in eight years. Currently, I have no signs of thyroid autoimmunity according to my blood work.

Dr. Anderson and my coach Jackie have been incredible; they were responsive, supportive, and genuinely invested in my health. I was at my wit’s end with traditional medicine, and this completely changed my life.

If you’re thinking about joining, I highly recommend it. It truly works.

reviews.name: places/ChIJEVc7V5o3QlMRv4EcjfK0FAk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sRWNYSjZTM1Y1YmpkUmVrcFhaREZtY1ZJNGVIYxAB
reviews.text: I am so grateful for Dr. Loy and the Thriven team! I’ve struggled with health anxiety, generalized anxiety, severe GI issues, and feeling “off” and just not feeling like I used to. I had tried different prescriptions with no relief and was told all of my labs were “normal”. I was feeling anxious, depressed and lost. After attending one of Dr. Loy’s seminars, I knew Thriven was the answer I had been looking for. I have learned so much about my health, mind, and body. My GI issues have resolved, my health anxiety has diminished significantly and Thriven has provided all the tools and resources to my health healing journey. I would highly recommend Thriven Functional Medicine to anyone struggling with the same issues!

reviews.name: places/ChIJEVc7V5o3QlMRv4EcjfK0FAk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SR1RVZHVNbk5YYkdSak1tRldNRkU1UW5GNmIzYxAB
reviews.text:
After 3 pregnancies back to back to back in my late 30’s, I didn’t even recognize myself and felt like my body wasn’t my own anymore. A friend recommended Thriven and after doing some research, I decided to give it a try. I was desperate for help, but didn’t even know where to start! Thankfully, the staff and Dr. Anderson have developed an easy-to-follow plan, with TONS of information that has truly changed my life. I learned so much about how traditional healthcare had been failing me (a field I worked in for almost 15 years!), and gained the knowledge needed to make better, more “ME-specific” choices that allow me to live a life where I’m no longer just surviving my day to day.
I’ve come off 2 meditations I’d been on for a decade or longer, completely changed the way my family approaches meal times, and learned more about areas that needed attention (BP, blood sugar) and how to positively impact those areas without adding medication.

If you’re on the fence, try it. Have the consultation and let the coaches share their methods and why functional medicine is really the BEST WAY to take back your health!

reviews.name: places/ChIJq6paGZLNXVMRhmKee9Jib0Y/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20wemFuaDZZV2hmY1hOS2RUaFpPVGRHUmpkQ2FFRRAB
reviews.text: We have been long standing clients with Dr. Matt's office for 8ish years now, I have referred many friends and family to see him and everyone has left in better shape than when they came. My daughter has complex medical issues and we had the hardest time finding a diagnosis. Matt Anderson was top notch in working with our other providers and consulting over her presentation of symptoms and together we were able to make it through to what feels like the other side. She will have lifelong things to address but she gets to have a childhood again. She is 10 and I genuinely do not think we would be where we are without his office, practice and a whole lot of patience. To anyone reading this that is considering becoming a patient, make the call and get your appointment scheduled it is worth the wait.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq6paGZLNXVMRhmKee9Jib0Y/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6LXFQRVF3EAE
reviews.text: Matt was my dad’s primary provider. My dad had intense abdominal pain for over a year. Matt worked him up for a tick bite. After a rapid 30 pound weight loss and dealing with pain for over a year, we convinced our dad to go to the ER to get a CT scan. My dad tried multiple times to schedule visits with Matt. He was told their office had flooded and they couldn’t get him in. When he finally got in, Matt did an “adjustment” but did nothing else. After my dad presented to the ER, they preformed an abdominal CT and found a grapefruit size cancerous mass. He died a month later. This review is meant to steer people to a professional that knows how to practice medicine. While it’s not Matt’s fault that my dad had cancer, he lacked any knowledge in dealing with a real medical issue. The third step in medicine would have been to order a CT scan. Medical professionals are not infallible, but they do have a responsibility to know how to correctly work up a patient’s medical issues.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq6paGZLNXVMRhmKee9Jib0Y/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPOWVMVmNBEAE
reviews.text: I’m so grateful for Matt Anderson’s gift for getting to the root of symptoms. He is caring and compassionate and has a gift of using many modalities to bring healing. He is my go to health provider and has helped me to heal from running injuries, allergy problems, and residual Covid effects.

reviews.text: Matt and Nicole have changed my life! I went from anxiety ridden no energy to having my life back. Truly blessed and grateful for both.

reviews.text: Charlotte Creekmore is avidly committed to women’s health and has proven it with tireless enthusiasm for decades - and it absolutely shows in her depth of knowledge as well as the professional, warm hug kind of care her patients enjoy. She truly listens to her patients and is actively working toward improving their situations. She is a creative problem solver and finds solutions.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ58EQ097PXVMR4ekpE9AS-1Q/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pkbk9UbHRNMVJoV214bU5qTmFTSFpvUVdsbVdGRRAB
reviews.text: I can not say enough good things about Charlotte! I came to her in December to establish care as a postmenopausal woman. Charlotte met me where I was, fatigued, achy and sleepless. She listened in a way that only a trained midwife can and made a plan for me and my health that was proactive, coordinated and specific to me. Charlotte helped me navigate the system to set up appointments and complete testing and provided so much critical support throughout the process. Now six months later I am healthier and more energized than I have been in years. Charlotte is a gem of a practioner and a gem of a woman. Trust her with your health and she will take that trust seriously!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ58EQ097PXVMR4ekpE9AS-1Q/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDOXJPQ1RBEAE
reviews.text: Charlotte is an excellent practitioner. I was blown away by how much time and attention she gave me. It’s the first time I’ve truly felt seen and heard by a medical professional. She follows through and checks in after the appointment. She leans toward a natural approach to treatment but is open to exploring and discussing all options, including western medicine. She considers the whole body and person with her treatment. She is easy and fun to talk to and I felt very comfortable with her instantly. She is easy to reach and shows true care for her patients. I highly recommend Folk and Charlotte to anyone looking for a trustworthy practitioner!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ58EQ097PXVMR4ekpE9AS-1Q/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYbE5LeTdRRRAB
reviews.text: Charlotte is exceptional, there is really no other description for her unique practice of healthcare. I pay cash, bypass insurance, can be a patient or not, and always seek her advice. She’s open minded and mirrors my goals. Whether it is diagnostics, labs, telehealth, western medicine or holistic suggestions, she has the guidance that I trust. You will too. You are missing out if you haven’t talked to her- she is an incredibly caring  (badass is the word here), and genuine human.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ58EQ097PXVMR4ekpE9AS-1Q/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NzYtcXRBRRAB
reviews.text: Charlotte has been a game changer for my health journey. Before I met with her, I was in terrible pain constantly (for years...) and had seen multiple doctors and specialists with no signs of healing, or even an accurate diagnosis. Charlotte's holistic and well rounded approach integrates multiple paths of medicine and she really goes the extra mile to ensure her patients see real progress. She connected me with other healthcare workers in different fields and with her help and the help of those professionals she's introduced to me I've literally got my life back. For me, healing is a continuous process and Charlotte is an amazing help for me. Not only is she well connected into the community of Missoula, but she's connected to her patients and is very easy to reach when you need her. And-- all of our progress has been made virtually over the computer! She is flexible with whether or not you want to meet in person or over the screen. If you are wondering whether or not to try Folk Integrative, let me help you decide: absolutely yes!

reviews.text: I cannot express how grateful I am for Amber! I started going to Amber earlier this year to help with various issues related to my overall health. I was not feeling like myself and thought I would try a different approach. Her professionalism, knowledge, and expertise was so impressive. Her approach and care towards my issues were so comforting, refreshing, and gave me hope for change in my symptoms. Through the testing and treatment plan that she suggested, I have COMPLETELY changed the course of my life. I am in tears writing this, because the change has been so dramatic and so huge that I can hardly believe it. She has given me a renewed hope in medicine, a renewed hope that a full, happy, healthy life is possible. She is truly amazing and I cannot recommend her more!

reviews.name: places/ChIJy-IsWSZpZlMRQvsuYDQ-rbI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsX19TaENREAE
reviews.text: I began working with Amber about 2 years ago after I was feeling not myself.  With some testing we discovered I was in early stages of Hashimotos.  After some lifestyle and diet changes, which of course took effort and time on my part, I’m happy to report my symptoms and labs have improved dramatically.  I’m grateful for Amber’s knowledge, encouragement and education on how I can feel my best in all areas of my life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJy-IsWSZpZlMRQvsuYDQ-rbI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLekxIS0hREAE
reviews.text: If you are looking to make a change in your life - maybe you are not sleeping well, maybe your stomach aches,  memory issues or concerns.... call Amber now!  Her in-depth knowledge of how the body works to create a happy healthy human is amazing!  She has  been beyond attentive with her interactions with me and really listens to my concerns.   I am sleeping better then ever and I feel awesome!    After every interaction with Amber I feel good about myself and I feel confident in her advice.  She is the best!

I suffered from chronic hives which affected me physically and emotionally.  To make a long story short, Dr. Petro totally changed my life! I can't thank him enough for his time and commitment ...he truly has a sincere passion in helping people become and stay healthy.  THANK YOU DR. Petro and God Bless!
Leanne

reviews.text: Dr. Petro has been my primary healthcare provider for over 15 years .  His holistic approach to medicine and treating the human body helped me understand what it means to be truly healthy.  His kind, giving nature and attentiveness always made me feel as if I was the only patient he was caring for at the time.  Dr. Petro also treated my daughters from the time they were infants (they are currently 6 and 10). He helped teach me what raising truly healthy children looked like. I would recommend Dr. Petro for anything that ails you or your children, no matter how big or small.
